meta._comment: skipBuild=true means this brief uses a hand-crafted HTML (not the template). build.mjs lists it in the manifest but leaves the HTML alone.

hero.eyebrow: ZERO WASTE FORUM 2026 · OPERATIONAL BRIEF · CUSTOMER
hero.lede: ONO Yazılım deploys the largest event-scale carbon measurement infrastructure in Türkiye for the Sıfır Atık Vakfı at Atatürk Havalimanı — under the foundation's name, with COP31 Antalya as the destination.

stage.role: Technology & operations provider. Invisible by design.

dashboard.headline: Live carbon data, projected on the main stage.
dashboard.description: Streams from 500 Carbostar PX devices, projected on the main stage. Dual-language, audience-readable, no jargon.

risks.title: Network instability at venue
risks.mitigation: Dual SIM + local-cache mode for dashboard.

risks.title: Foundation brand approval slippage
risks.mitigation: Brand kit pre-locked + escalation contact at TKF.

bridgeNodes.desc: Tactical introductions with ministers, mayors, UN officials. English brief card on every Carbostar.
Municipal pilot conversations spun out of forum contacts.
Carbostar PX active in the Sıfır Atık pavilion. Türkiye positioned as MRV-capable host nation.

closing.manifesto: The Sıfır Atık Forumu 2026 is not a delivery for ONO — it is an entry into the international climate-tech bloodstream of Türkiye. Every Carbostar PX is a calling card.
closing.signoff: ONO Yazılım · operations spine · invisible by design
